DryCheckConfig.docs: Infrastructure-layer loaded configuration for the dry-check gate. Reads `.harness/config/dry-check.json` via `load(path)`. Internal representation has all-private fields; the public API is accessors only. After this track: schema_version acceptance changes from 3 to 4 exclusively (CN-05), and an `enabled: bool` field is added with a corresponding `enabled()` accessor. The private serde DTO (`DryCheckConfigDto`) is internal to this module and is not catalogued.

DryCheckConfigError.docs: Error variants from DryCheckConfig::load. No variant changes in this track; referenced because the load() signature is being modified to accept schema_version 4.

methods.name: load
methods.docs: Load dry-check configuration from a JSON file. After this track, accepts schema_version 4 only (rejects schema_version 3 and any other value with UnsupportedSchemaVersion). Also parses the `enabled` boolean field (defaulting to false when absent).

methods.name: enabled
methods.docs: Returns whether the DRY gate is enabled. New accessor added by this track.

methods.name: threshold
methods.docs: Returns the similarity threshold from the loaded configuration.

methods.name: max_parallelism
methods.docs: Returns the raw max_parallelism usize from the loaded JSON. Returns a raw primitive because this is the infrastructure Dto layer; the composition root lifts it into the validated DryCheckParallelism newtype (R9: raw primitive justified as unvalidated Dto accessor).

methods.name: fast_reasoning_effort
methods.docs: Returns the reasoning effort for the fast-round DRY checker.

methods.name: final_reasoning_effort
methods.docs: Returns the reasoning effort for the final-round DRY checker.

methods.name: known_bad_injection_rate_percent
methods.docs: Returns the raw known_bad_injection_rate_percent u8 from the loaded JSON. Raw primitive: infrastructure Dto accessor; composition root lifts it into DryCheckPercent (R9: Dto layer unvalidated value).

methods.name: known_bad_detection_threshold_percent
methods.docs: Returns the raw known_bad_detection_threshold_percent u8 from the loaded JSON. Raw primitive: infrastructure Dto accessor; composition root lifts it into DryCheckPercent (R9: Dto layer unvalidated value).

methods.name: fingerprint_with_threshold
methods.docs: Compute a SHA-256 fingerprint using the given effective threshold in place of self.threshold.

methods.name: fingerprint
methods.docs: Compute a SHA-256 fingerprint using self.threshold as the effective threshold.
